bird.name: 斑胸文鸟
bird.summary: 斑胸文鸟（学名：Heteromunia pectoralis），是梅花雀科斑胸文鸟属的一种，是游猎迁徙的候鸟，为澳大利亚的特有种。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。 斑胸文鸟的平均体重约为15.2克。栖息地包括亚热带或热带的旱林、干燥的稀树草原、耕地和亚热带或热带的（低地）干草原。

relations.subject: 斑胸文鸟
relations.evidence: It is a seed-eater found in pairs and small flocks in dry savannah and subtropical or tropical dry lowland grassland
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 斑胸文鸟
relations.evidence: Pictorella mannikins forage on the ground in small flocks or pairs on seeding native grasses and sometimes take small invertebrates. Flocks aggregate around inland water sources particularly at the end of the dry season but disperse away from permanent water when rain falls. In northern Australia they often forage on recently burnt ground, open grassy woodland and fringes of wetland. They are relatively short tailed with an upright stance. Pictorella mannikin pairs mate for life and lay 4 to 6 white or bluish white eggs in a dome-shaped grass nest in long grass or low bush. In 2016 the pictorella mannikin's conservation status was listed Least Concern (LC) on the IUCN Red List although the population is marked as decreasing
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。
